benefit: Rs. 6,000 per year in three instalments
application_process: Register through the PM-KISAN portal, Common Service Centre, or state agriculture department after Aadhaar and land-record verification.
summary: Direct income support for eligible landholding farmer families.

benefit: Health cover up to Rs. 5 lakh per family per year
application_process: Check eligibility and generate Ayushman card through the beneficiary portal, PM-JAY app, empanelled hospital, or Common Service Centre.
summary: Cashless secondary and tertiary hospital care for eligible families.

eligibility: Economically weaker section or low income group
benefit: Central assistance for affordable urban housing
application_process: Apply through the PMAY-U portal, urban local body, or approved facilitation centre with income and housing-status verification.
summary: Affordable housing assistance for eligible urban households.

benefit: Financial assistance for construction of a pucca rural house
application_process: Eligible rural households are identified by Gram Sabha and verified through the PMAY-G/AwaasSoft workflow.
summary: Rural housing support for families lacking a pucca house.

scheme_name: National Scholarship Portal - Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
benefit: Scholarship support as per notified class and hosteller/day-scholar rates
application_process: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal with institution verification and state/central approval.
summary: Financial support for eligible Scheduled Caste students before matriculation.

scheme_name: National Scholarship Portal - Post-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
benefit: Maintenance allowance and eligible fee support
application_process: Submit an online application on the National Scholarship Portal and complete institute verification.
summary: Post-matric financial assistance for eligible Scheduled Caste students.

scheme_name: National Scholarship Portal - Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
benefit: Maintenance allowance and eligible fee support
application_process: Apply on the National Scholarship Portal and complete institution and state verification.
summary: Post-matric scholarship assistance for eligible OBC students.

scheme_name: National Scholarship Portal - Scholarships for Students with Disabilities
benefit: Scholarship support for eligible disabled students
application_process: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal with disability and institution verification.
summary: Education assistance for eligible students with disabilities.

benefit: Industry-oriented skill training and certification
application_process: Register through Skill India Digital or an approved training centre for counselling, training, assessment, and certification.
summary: Skill training and certification support for youth seeking work opportunities.

benefit: Collateral-free loans up to Rs. 10 lakh through Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun categories
application_process: Apply through a bank, NBFC, MFI, or the Udyamimitra portal with business and KYC documents.
summary: Credit support for micro and small non-farm businesses.

benefit: Government-backed savings account for girl child education and marriage goals
application_process: Open an account at a post office or authorised bank branch in the name of an eligible girl child.
summary: Small savings scheme for long-term welfare of a girl child.

benefit: Guaranteed monthly pension from Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 5,000 after age 60 based on contribution
application_process: Enroll through a bank branch, net banking, or pension service channel and select pension slab and auto-debit contribution.
summary: Contributory pension scheme for workers planning retirement security.

benefit: Recognition, toolkit support, skill training, stipend, and collateral-free credit support
application_process: Register through the PM Vishwakarma portal or Common Service Centre followed by Gram Panchayat/ULB and district verification.
summary: End-to-end support for traditional artisans and craftspeople.

benefit: Seed support through approved incubators for proof of concept, prototype, trials, market entry, and commercialization
application_process: Apply through Startup India to an approved incubator with business plan and startup documents.
summary: Seed-stage funding support for eligible DPIIT-recognised startups.

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan
benefit: Digital literacy training and certification
application_process: Enroll through an authorised PMGDISHA training centre for training and assessment.
summary: Digital literacy training for rural citizens.

benefit: Bank loans from Rs. 10 lakh to Rs. 1 crore for greenfield enterprises
application_process: Apply through the Stand-Up India portal or a scheduled commercial bank branch with project and KYC documents.
summary: Enterprise loans for women and SC/ST entrepreneurs.

benefit: Margin money subsidy for eligible micro-enterprises
documents: Education or skill certificate if applicable
application_process: Apply online through the KVIC PMEGP e-portal with project details and agency verification.
summary: Credit-linked subsidy support for new micro-enterprises.

eligibility: No existing LPG connection in household
benefit: Deposit-free LPG connection support for eligible households
application_process: Apply with an LPG distributor or online through the PMUY channel with household and KYC documents.
summary: LPG connection support for women from eligible poor households.

eligibility: Age 10 or above for basic savings account
benefit: Basic savings bank account with RuPay card and financial inclusion benefits
application_process: Open an account at a bank branch or Bank Mitra using officially valid KYC documents.
summary: Basic banking access for unbanked citizens.

scheme_name: National Social Assistance Programme - Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
benefit: Monthly social pension support as per central and state norms
application_process: Apply through local panchayat, municipality, social welfare office, or state pension portal.
summary: Social pension support for eligible poor senior citizens.

scheme_name: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana
benefit: Cashless treatment in empanelled hospitals as per package rules
application_process: Use valid ration card and identity documents at an empanelled hospital or contact an Aarogyamitra for registration.
summary: Maharashtra health assurance scheme for eligible households.

eligibility: Yellow or orange ration card household
benefit: Phased financial assistance for eligible girl children
application_process: Apply through local Anganwadi, women and child development office, or notified state process with required documents.
summary: State support for girl child welfare in eligible Maharashtra households.

scheme_name: Maharashtra Government Scholarship for Economically Backward Class Students
benefit: Education fee support as per Maharashtra scholarship rules
application_process: Apply through the MahaDBT portal and complete institute verification.
summary: Fee assistance for eligible economically backward students in Maharashtra.

scheme_name: Maharashtra Sanjay Gandhi Niradhar Anudan Yojana
eligibility: Destitute person or widow or person with disability
benefit: Monthly financial assistance as per state rules
documents: Disability or widow certificate if applicable
application_process: Apply through local tehsil/social welfare office or state service channel with supporting certificates.
summary: Financial assistance for vulnerable and destitute residents of Maharashtra.

eligibility: Self-help group or joint liability group of farmers
benefit: Short-term credit support for crop cultivation and allied agricultural needs
application_process: Apply through a bank branch, agriculture credit camp, or official digital scheme channel with KYC and farming details.
summary: Credit facility for farmers to meet crop and allied activity expenses.

benefit: Crop insurance protection against notified natural risks and yield losses
application_process: Enroll through the National Crop Insurance Portal, bank, CSC, or authorised insurance channel during the notified season.
summary: Crop insurance support for farmers growing notified crops.

benefit: Working capital loan support for eligible street vendors
documents: Certificate of vending or letter of recommendation
application_process: Apply through the PM SVANidhi portal, urban local body, or lending institution with vending and KYC documents.
summary: Working capital support for eligible urban street vendors.

benefit: Accident insurance cover as notified under the scheme
application_process: Enroll through participating bank, internet banking, mobile banking, or authorised banking channel.
summary: Low-cost accident insurance for eligible bank account holders.

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
benefit: Life insurance cover as notified under the scheme
application_process: Enroll through participating bank, internet banking, mobile banking, or authorised banking channel.
summary: Low-cost life insurance for eligible savings bank account holders.

eligibility: Not a member of EPFO or ESIC
benefit: National database registration and access to eligible social security benefits
application_process: Register through the e-Shram portal or Common Service Centre using Aadhaar-based verification.
summary: Registration platform for unorganised workers to access social security benefits.

eligibility: Eligible first child or notified category
benefit: Maternity benefit assistance as per scheme rules
application_process: Apply through Anganwadi centre, health facility, or PMMVY digital channel with pregnancy and bank details.
summary: Maternity assistance for eligible pregnant women and lactating mothers.

benefit: Awareness, education, and protection interventions for the girl child
documents: Aadhaar if required by local programme
application_process: Access programme support through district administration, women and child development department, or local campaign activities.
summary: National initiative for survival, protection, and education of the girl child.

benefit: Integrated support including medical, legal, police, counselling, and temporary shelter assistance
documents: Medical or police documents if available
application_process: Approach the nearest One Stop Centre, Women Helpline 181, police, hospital, or district administration for immediate support.
summary: Integrated emergency and support services for women affected by violence.

eligibility: Age 14 or above as per trade rules
benefit: Apprenticeship training support and stipend sharing as per rules
application_process: Register on the apprenticeship portal, apply to establishments, and complete contract approval.
summary: Apprenticeship training pathway for youth and job seekers.

scheme_name: PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Enterprises
benefit: Credit-linked support and capacity building for micro food processing enterprises
application_process: Apply through the PMFME portal or state nodal agency with enterprise and project details.
summary: Support for formalising and upgrading micro food processing businesses.

scheme_name: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
benefit: Central subsidy support for rooftop solar installation for eligible households
application_process: Register on the national rooftop solar portal, select vendor, complete installation, inspection, and subsidy request.
summary: Rooftop solar subsidy support for eligible residential households.

benefit: Financial assistance of Rs. 50,000 per hectare for 3 years for organic farming
application_process: Apply through state agriculture extension officers or register as a cluster on the PKVY portal.
summary: Promotion of organic farming through cluster approach and financial aid.

benefit: Subsidy on micro-irrigation systems (drip and sprinkler) up to 55%
application_process: Register on the state PMKSY portal or consult state horticulture/agriculture departments.
summary: Improving on-farm water use efficiency through micro-irrigation systems.

eligibility: Women farmers and SC/ST categories prioritized
benefit: Subsidy of 40% to 50% on purchase of agricultural machinery and tools
application_process: Apply on the Agribazaar or SMAM DBT portal of the central government.
summary: Promoting farm mechanization among small and marginal farmers.

benefit: Free soil test and customized nutrient recommendations card every 2 years
application_process: Agriculture department officers collect soil samples from the field, test them, and deliver the card.
summary: Free soil testing and customized advisory cards for farmers.

benefit: Guaranteed monthly pension of Rs. 3,000 after attaining age 60
application_process: Enroll through Common Service Centres (CSC) or self-register on the PM-KMDY portal.
summary: Voluntary and contributory pension scheme for small and marginal farmers.

eligibility: Score at least 55% in class VIII
benefit: Scholarship of Rs. 12,000 per year from class IX to XII
application_process: Apply on the National Scholarship Portal (NSP) after qualifying in the state level scholarship exam.
summary: Financial assistance for meritorious students from economically weaker sections.

scheme_name: PM-USP Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship
eligibility: Regular college student in recognized course
benefit: Scholarship of Rs. 12,000 to Rs. 20,000 per year for college education
application_process: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal (NSP) with college verification.
summary: Scholarship for meritorious students pursuing college and university studies.

scheme_name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students
eligibility: Admitted in technical degree or diploma course
benefit: Scholarship of Rs. 50,000 per year for tuition fee and computer support
application_process: Submit application online on the AICTE Pragati portal or National Scholarship Portal.
summary: Empowering girl students to pursue technical education with financial aid.

benefit: Guaranteed pension return of 7.4% per annum for a policy term of 10 years
application_process: Purchase pension policy online or offline through Life Insurance Corporation (LIC) of India.
summary: Government subsidized pension plan offering assured monthly returns for senior citizens.

scheme_name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
benefit: Monthly pension of Rs. 300 to Rs. 500 per month (plus state contribution)
application_process: Submit application to Block Development Officer (BDO) or social welfare office.
summary: Monthly pension support for widows living in BPL households.

scheme_name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
benefit: Monthly pension of Rs. 300 to Rs. 500 (with additional state support)
application_process: Apply through the local Social Welfare Department or Gram Panchayat office.
summary: Financial support for severely disabled persons below the poverty line.

benefit: High interest savings account (current rate 8.2%) with tax benefits under 80C
application_process: Open the savings account at any post office branch or authorized nationalized bank.
summary: Safe post-retirement investment program backed by the Government of India.

benefit: Access to quality generic medicines at 50% to 90% cheaper rates than market prices
application_process: Purchase directly from any PM Janaushadhi Kendra located across India.
summary: Making quality healthcare affordable by providing low-cost generic drugs.

eligibility: Patient suffering from life threatening diseases
benefit: One-time financial assistance up to Rs. 15 lakh for medical treatment
documents: Medical report and estimate from hospital
application_process: Apply through the medical superintendent of the treating government hospital.
summary: Financial support for patients below poverty line suffering from life-threatening diseases.

benefit: National database card enabling simplified access to central and state benefits
application_process: Register online on the Swavlamban Card portal, upload disability details, and undergo hospital validation.
summary: National single-window identification card for persons with disabilities.

scheme_name: Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase of Aids
benefit: Free fitting or purchase of aids and appliances (wheelchairs, hearing aids, artificial limbs)
application_process: Register at authorized camps organized by ALIMCO, NGOs, or the local Social Welfare department.
summary: Providing assistive devices and tools to needy persons with disabilities.

eligibility: Income below Rs. 2.5 Lakh per year
Valid bank account linked with Aadhaar
benefit: Rs. 1,500 per month financial assistance
application_process: Apply online through the Nari Shakti Doot App or local Anganwadi/social welfare office.
summary: Monthly financial support of Rs. 1500 for eligible women residents of Maharashtra.

benefit: Rs. 6,000 per year in three equal instalments
application_process: Register on the Namo Shetkari portal; eligible PM-Kisan farmers from Maharashtra are automatically matched and verified.
summary: Additional direct income support of Rs. 6000 per year for farmers of Maharashtra.

eligibility: SC or ST or Neo-Buddhist category
benefit: Financial assistance for construction of a pucca house in rural/urban areas
application_process: Apply online through the Maha Awas portal or submit application to Gram Panchayat / Block Development Officer.
summary: Housing assistance for Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe families in Maharashtra.
